description:
This advanced JavaScript quiz rigorously tests developers' expertise in complex error handling, serialization edge cases, and cross-context type checking. Designed for intermediate to advanced practitioners, it employs a playful, slightly irreverent tone to challenge conventional debugging knowledge and separate juniors from seasoned professionals.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, serialization edge cases, cross-context instanceof, advanced debugging, JavaScript gotchas
Audience: Intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers
